image:image.image:title: MasterChess — Free Online Chess
image:image.image:caption: Play chess online free with AI coach and tournaments.

image:image.image:title: Italian Game chess opening (ECO C50-C54) — starting position
image:image.image:caption: Board position after 1.e4 e5 2.Nf3 Nc6 3.Bc4 — learn the Italian Game on MasterChess.

image:image.image:title: Sicilian Defense chess opening (ECO B20-B99) — starting position
image:image.image:caption: Board position after 1.e4 c5 — learn the Sicilian Defense on MasterChess.

image:image.image:title: French Defense chess opening (ECO C00-C19) — starting position
image:image.image:caption: Board position after 1.e4 e6 — learn the French Defense on MasterChess.

image:image.image:caption: Board position after the opening moves — learn the ruy lopez spanish on MasterChess.

image:image.image:title: Queen's Gambit chess opening (ECO D06-D69) — starting position
image:image.image:caption: Board position after 1.d4 d5 2.c4 — learn the Queen's Gambit on MasterChess.

image:image.image:caption: Board position after 1.d4 d5 2.Bf4 — learn the London System on MasterChess.
